name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.9900. Trade idea: entry A$12.1100, stop A$10.4841, target A$14.1259 (1.24:1) — then trail it.
